isolation.notes: Used a fresh isolated HOME under /tmp so ~/.vera/models state was deterministic, created project-A and project-B inside that HOME, and did not modify system libraries or rebuild the shared binary.

assertions.reason: With ORT_DYLIB_PATH forced to a nonexistent file inside the isolated temp area, vera index --local exited non-zero and printed a human-readable ONNX Runtime error that explicitly suggested API mode as the alternative. No panic or backtrace appeared.
evidence:
Command observation: Error: Failed to initialize local embedding provider: embedding API error (status 500): ONNX Runtime shared library not found. Local inference requires ONNX Runtime to be installed.
Install it from: https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/releases
Or use API mode instead by setting EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL, EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID, and EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY.
Original error: failed to load from `/tmp/vera-local-mode-ZCdfaK/missing/libonnxruntime-does-not-exist.so`: dlopen failed
Hint: check network connection or manually place model at ~/.vera/models/

assertions.reason: A real local index run on project-A with the isolated HOME failed before any model download or indexing work because ONNX Runtime was unavailable via the default libonnxruntime.so lookup. The isolated ~/.vera/models cache was never created, so lazy download plus successful indexing could not be validated.
evidence:
Command observation: Error: Failed to initialize local embedding provider: embedding API error (status 500): ONNX Runtime shared library not found. Local inference requires ONNX Runtime to be installed.
Install it from: https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime/releases
Or use API mode instead by setting EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL, EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID, and EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY.
Original error: failed to load from `libonnxruntime.so`: dlopen failed
Hint: check network connection or manually place model at ~/.vera/models/

assertions.reason: VERA_LOCAL=1 search could not be compared with search --local because the prerequisite local project index was never created: the initial real local index on project-A failed immediately due to missing ONNX Runtime.
evidence: Prerequisite not met: no successful local index exists under project-A/.vera.

assertions.reason: Project-B cache reuse could not be exercised because project-A never completed the first local download/index cycle. The isolated HOME still had no ~/.vera/models cache after the project-A attempt.
evidence: Project-B was intentionally not indexed after the prerequisite project-A cache creation failed.

assertions.reason: Source inspection shows the local embedding and reranker code reference only quantized ONNX filenames, but the runtime half of the assertion could not be completed because the isolated HOME never downloaded any local models after local indexing was blocked by missing ONNX Runtime.

blockers.description: ONNX Runtime shared library was unavailable in the isolated local-mode environment. Both the explicit missing-path check and the default libonnxruntime.so lookup failed before any models were downloaded.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: After validating the forced-missing ORT_DYLIB_PATH failure path, retried a real local index without overriding ORT_DYLIB_PATH; it failed the same way with libonnxruntime.so missing and left ~/.vera/models absent.

summary: Tested 5 assigned simplify-install local-mode assertions via the release CLI binary. Result: 1 passed (VAL-INST-015), 0 failed, 4 blocked by missing ONNX Runtime in the isolated HOME.
